ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-28-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, 1. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY GRANTED. REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS GRANTED; SANCTIONS SHALL ISSUE IN THE SUM OF $290.00. PROVIDED, HOWEVER, THAT IMPOSITION OF SANCTIONS IS STAYED FOR TEN DAYS FROM THE DATE OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER; IF DEFENDANTS SERVE DISCOVERY RESPONSES AS ORDERED WITHIN TEN DAYS OF THIS ORDER, SANCTIONS SHALL BE PERMANENTLY STAYED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Ofp/A In Support Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions And Declaration Of Stephen M. Kappos In Support Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
1. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s Motion to compel answers to post-judgment discovery granted as follows:
a. All objections are waived, except for attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Within ten days of the date of service of this order, defendant shall serve full, complete and verified responses to plaintiff's post-judgment request for production of documents (set one); and post-judgment interrogatories (set one);
2. Request for monetary sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00. Provided, however, that imposition of sanctions is stayed for ten days from the date of service of this order; if defendants serve discovery responses as ordered within ten days of this order, sanctions shall be permanently stayed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2008 Off Calendar
